articles.title: Dozens of sloths died before opening of Sloth World attraction in Florida - BBC
articles.description: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.
articles.content: The FWC closed its investigations into the animal deaths without a written warning or citation, an agency spokesperson told the BBC. There are, however, a number of other regulatory bodies investigat… [+26 chars]

articles.author: Marco Quiroz-Gutierrez
articles.title: This is a ‘come to Jesus moment’: Ford CEO says American carmakers are battling a perfect storm - Fortune
articles.description: If Ford "doesn't put its chips on the right number," it may not survive, said Farley.
articles.content: Ford CEO Jim Farley, the leader of the 122-year-old company that democratized the car for everyday Americans, said carmakers are facing three perfect-storm moments that could prove existential.Farley… [+4534 chars]
